stemHtml:
Given the following information, what would be the approximate ground speed during a descent from FL290 to MSL (QNH 1013)?

Descent speed: 250 kt CAS
Average ISA Deviation : -8°C
Descent track: 210°(T)
MSL W/V: 275°(T)/10 kt
5000 ft W/V: 280°(T) /20 kt
10000 ft W/V : 310°(T) / 45 kt
15000 ft W/V : 310°(T) / 45 kt
20000 ft W/V : 330°(T) / 50 kt
25000 ft W/V : 330°(T) / 55 kt
30000 ft W/V : 330°(T) / 55 kt
